blended.narrative: Mt. Bachelor is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours with little to no accumulation. Looking ahead, 22 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Wednesday: 2.2" of snow, highs of 29°F. Expect variable conditions.
Thursday: 10" of heavy snow, highs of 29°F. Expect powder.
Friday: 7" of snow, highs of 27°F. Expect powder.

recent_conditions.narrative: 10.8" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is building — up 4" over the past week. Current depth: 19".
